title: An experimental aircraft spotted near Santa Maria Airport? [2012]
excerpt: JUL 15th, 2012. Time: 19h40m. Clear sky. Near the Municipal Airport of Santa Maria, Rio Grande do Sul. Duration: three minutes. A pilot of TAM airline company reported the sighting of an unidentified flying object, the size of a jet, 5NM in front of his aircraft. The UFO was moving in the opposite direction, with […]
text_preview: JUL 15th, 2012. Time: 19h40m. Clear sky. Near the Municipal Airport of Santa Maria, Rio Grande do Sul. Duration: three minutes. A pilot of TAM airline company reported the sighting of an unidentified flying object, the size of a jet, 5NM in front of his aircraft. The UFO was moving in the opposite direction, with flashing red lights, at an altitude of approximately 20,000ft and heading Southwest. The COMDABRA [Brazilian Aerospace Defense Command] report contains additional observations from the pilot, according to which, “the sighting appeared to be of an experimental aircraft, for military us
summary: TAM pilot near Santa Maria Airport observed a jet-sized UFO with flashing red lights moving in the opposite direction, described as possibly experimental military aircraft.
